# CyberShield Pull Request / Build Review Checklist

## Build identity

- Target build/version:
- Builder:
- Date:

## Scope

Describe what changed.

## Required checks

- [ ] Source-of-truth files agree on current build/version
- [ ] README.md updated if needed
- [ ] bots.txt updated if needed
- [ ] governance-summary.json updated if needed
- [ ] successor handoff updated if needed
- [ ] builder-version-log updated
- [ ] requirements traceability matrix updated if needed
- [ ] affected requirement docs updated
- [ ] no new top-level tabs unless approved
- [ ] no executive-facing build/version labels
- [ ] no dead clicks introduced
- [ ] every score routes to model explanation or documented planned model
- [ ] no live capability overclaims introduced
- [ ] TrustMap did not regress
- [ ] onboarding behavior is role/industry aware if touched
- [ ] report/export boundary language is present if reports changed
- [ ] Firefox checked
- [ ] mobile readability checked
- [ ] recurring build issues watchlist reviewed

## Screens or flows tested

- [ ] Briefing
- [ ] TrustMap
- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] Evidence
- [ ] Proof Pack
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Settings

## Notes

Add limitations, known issues, or follow-up tasks.
